source: github.com/tailscale/hujson value, minimize, and standardize tests

cases.name: top-level-null-with-extra
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve surrounding whitespace.

cases.name: comments-around-null
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve comment-width whitespace.

cases.name: line-comment-with-newline
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve comment-width whitespace.

cases.name: escaped-string
cases.divergence: This bootstrap minimize/standardize API round-trips through JSON.parse and JSON.stringify, so equivalent string escapes can be canonicalized.

cases.name: large-exponent-number
cases.divergence: JavaScript JSON.stringify converts this non-finite numeric value to null after JSON.parse returns Infinity.

cases.name: object-with-spacing
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve insignificant whitespace.

cases.name: object-with-trailing-comma
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve trailing-comma whitespace.

cases.name: array-with-spacing
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve insignificant whitespace.

cases.name: array-with-trailing-comma
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve trailing-comma whitespace.

cases.name: mixed-array
cases.divergence: This bootstrap standardize/minimize API returns semantic JSON and does not preserve comment-width whitespace.
